_comment: Tier-2 for fenics stokes#: dolfinx.io.gmshio is an OPTIONAL submodule that only loads when the Python 'gmsh' package is installed. The current ofa-fenicsx env does not include gmsh, so any catalog generator calling dolfinx.io.gmshio.model_to_mesh raises ImportError. This fixture is a live diagnostic recorder — it ALWAYS PASSES and just prints whether gmshio is currently importable. When gmsh is installed via 'conda install -c conda-forge gmsh python-gmsh', the recorded status flips. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
